name: onelitefeather-claude-marketplace
description: OneLiteFeather — Claude Code plugins for our developer framework (Outline knowledge graph + standardized dev tooling)

plugins.name: framework
plugins.description: OneLiteFeather's developer framework: bundles standardized tools for how the team builds software, including a knowledge graph in Outline's "Vault" collection.

plugins.name: framework-code-navigation
plugins.description: Optional companion to framework: Serena (LSP symbol search) for JVM/Java-Kotlin projects. Install only where it fits.

plugins.name: minestom-knowledge
plugins.description: Accurate knowledge of OneLiteFeather's internal Minestom libraries and tooling (Cyano testing, Gradle conventions, BOM hierarchy, Guira setup flows, Aves utilities, Xerus minigame core, Pica dialogs, Coris floors/rooms/doors), too internal/new to be in general training data.
